initialize.title: Initialize WorkPilot AI
initialize.description: This project doesn't have WorkPilot AI initialized. Would you like to set it up now?
initialize.createFolder: Create a .auto-claude folder in your project
initialize.copyFramework: Copy the WorkPilot AI framework files
initialize.setupSpecs: Set up the specs directory for your tasks
initialize.sourcePathNotConfiguredDescription: Please set the WorkPilot AI source path in App Settings before initializing.
initialize.initFailedDescription: Failed to initialize WorkPilot AI. Please try again.

gitSetup.title: Git Repository Required
gitSetup.description: WorkPilot AI uses git to safely build features in isolated workspaces
gitSetup.notGitRepo: This folder is not a git repository
gitSetup.needsInit: Git needs to be initialized before WorkPilot AI can manage your code.
gitSetup.needsCommit: At least one commit is required for WorkPilot AI to create worktrees.
gitSetup.willSetup: We'll set up git for you:
gitSetup.createCommit: Create an initial commit with your current files
gitSetup.manualTerminal: Or run these commands in your terminal:
gitSetup.initializingRepo: Initializing git repository and creating initial commit...
gitSetup.readyToUse: Your project is now ready to use with WorkPilot AI!

githubSetup.title: Configure GitHub
githubSetup.description: Enter the repository and GitHub token to connect your project.
githubSetup.testConnectionDesc: Verify that your GitHub credentials are valid
githubSetup.tokenInvalidFormat: Invalid token format. GitHub tokens start with ghp_, gho_, ghu_, ghs_, ghr_ or github_pat_
githubSetup.fineGrainedTokenPermissions: Required permissions: Contents: Read, Metadata: Read. Make sure the token is authorized for this repository.
githubSetup.classicTokenPermissions: Required permissions: 'repo' scope for full repository access.
githubSetup.fineGrainedTokenPermissionsError: Insufficient permissions. Check that your fine-grained token has 'Contents: Read' and 'Metadata: Read' permissions for this repository.
githubSetup.classicTokenPermissionsError: Insufficient permissions. Check that your classic token has 'repo' scope.
githubSetup.repositoryNotFoundError: Repository not found. Check that the repository name is correct and that you have access to it.
githubSetup.connectDescription: WorkPilot AI requires GitHub to manage your code branches and keep tasks up to date.
githubSetup.claudeDescription: WorkPilot AI uses Claude AI for intelligent features like Roadmap generation, Task automation, and Ideation.
githubSetup.repoDescription: WorkPilot AI will use this repository for managing task branches and keeping your code up to date.
githubSetup.branchDescription: Choose which branch WorkPilot AI should use as the base for creating task branches.
githubSetup.branchExplanation: WorkPilot AI creates isolated workspaces for each task. Selecting the right base branch ensures your tasks start with the latest code from your main development line.
githubSetup.ready: WorkPilot AI is ready to use! You can now create tasks that will be automatically based on the {{branchName}} branch.

repoProvider.title: Remote Provider
repoProvider.description: Choose where {{projectName}} should connect for issue tracking and code management.
repoProvider.githubDescription: Use GitHub for issues, PRs, branches, and repository hosting.
repoProvider.azureDescription: Use Azure DevOps Boards for work items and repository hosting.
repoProvider.jiraDescription: Connect to Jira for issue tracking and project management (requires separate Git repository).
repoProvider.skipDescription: Don't connect a remote provider now.

azureDevOpsSetup.title: Connect to Azure DevOps
azureDevOpsSetup.description: Add your Azure DevOps credentials to import and sync work items.
azureDevOpsSetup.repositoryNote: You can select the repository in the project settings after this step.

worktrees.title: Worktrees
worktrees.description: Manage isolated workspaces for your WorkPilot AI tasks
worktrees.emptyDescription: Worktrees are created automatically when WorkPilot AI builds features.
worktrees.emptyDescriptionTerminal: You can also create terminal worktrees from the Agent Terminals tab.
worktrees.mergeDescription: Merge changes from this worktree into the base branch.
worktrees.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the worktree and all uncommitted changes. This action cannot be undone.
worktrees.bulkDeleteDescription: This will permanently delete the selected worktrees and all their uncommitted changes. This action cannot be undone.

worktreeCleanup.title: Complete Task
worktreeCleanup.hasWorktree: The task "{{taskTitle}}" still has an isolated workspace (worktree).
worktreeCleanup.willDelete: To mark this task as complete, the worktree and its associated branch will be deleted.
worktreeCleanup.warning: Make sure you have merged or saved any changes you want to keep before proceeding.
worktreeCleanup.errorDescription: Failed to cleanup worktree. Please try again.

addFeature.title: Add Feature
addFeature.description: Add a new feature to your roadmap. Provide details about what you want to build and how it fits into your product strategy.
addFeature.featureTitlePlaceholder: e.g., User Authentication, Dark Mode Support
addFeature.featureDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this feature does and why it's valuable to users.
addFeature.rationalePlaceholder: Explain why this feature should be built and how it fits the product vision.
addFeature.failedToAdd: Failed to add feature. Please try again.

addProject.title: Add Project
addProject.description: Choose how you'd like to add a project
addProject.openExistingDescription: Browse to an existing project on your computer
addProject.createNewDescription: Start fresh with a new project folder
addProject.createNewSubtitle: Set up a new project folder
addProject.projectNameHelp: This will be the folder name. Use lowercase with hyphens.
addProject.summarySubtitle: Review your project details before creating
addProject.successDescription: The project has been successfully created and configured.

customModel.title: Custom Model Configuration
customModel.description: Configure the model and thinking level for this chat session.

removeProject.title: Remove Project?
removeProject.description: This will remove "{{projectName}}" from the app. Your files will be preserved on disk and you can re-add the project later.

appUpdate.title: App Update Available
appUpdate.description: A new version of WorkPilot AI is ready to download
appUpdate.updateDownloaded: Update downloaded successfully! Click Install to restart and apply the update.
appUpdate.claudeCodeChangelogAriaLabel: View Claude Code Changelog (opens in new window)
appUpdate.readOnlyVolumeDescription: Please move WorkPilot AI to your Applications folder before updating.

versionWarning.title: Action Required
versionWarning.subtitle: Version 2.7.5 Update
versionWarning.description: Due to authentication changes in this version, you need to re-authenticate your Claude profile.

conflictPredictor.title: Conflict Predictor
conflictPredictor.description: Proactive conflict detection between worktrees and branches
conflictPredictor.noConflictsDetected: No conflicts detected - safe for parallel development!

dependencySentinel.title: Dependency Sentinel
dependencySentinel.description: Monitor dependencies for security vulnerabilities and outdated packages
dependencySentinel.noDependenciesFound: No dependencies found matching your search
dependencySentinel.noVulnerabilitiesFound: No vulnerabilities found matching your search

authDialog.title: Authentication Required
authDialog.description: The provider "{{provider}}" is not yet configured.
authDialog.subDescription: To use this provider, you must first add your API keys in the "Accounts" section.
